zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Malet於1424年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特布利其沃特時，她的父親Hugh Malet35歲，母親Joan Roynon23歲。她於大約1459年與Sir William Hody在英國英格蘭多瑟特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1510年在英國英格蘭享年86歲。

nameMeanings.name: Malet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: nickname from a diminutive of Mal ‘bad’ or from a derivative of the related Old French word maleit ‘accursed’ (see Mallet 1). Compare Malette .
French: from the Old French personal name Malet, a pet form of Malo (compare Mallet 2).

variants.name: Mal
meanings: Slovenian: nickname for a physically small man, from mal ‘small, little’.

variants.name: Malette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gaston, Alphonse, Francois, Jacques, Rejean, Serge.
French: variant or feminine form of Malet and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this, reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Malet was born in 1424, in Bridgwater, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Hugh Malet, was 35 and her mother, Joan Roynon, was 23. She married Sir William Hody about 1459, in Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1510, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Malet est née en 1424, à Bridgwater, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh Malet, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Joan Roynon, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Hody environ 1459, à Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1510, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 86 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Maletが1424年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトブリドグワターで生まれた時，父Hugh Maletは35歳，母Joan Roynonは23歳であった。約1459年にイギリスイギリスドールセトでSir William Hodyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1510年にイギリスイギリスで86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Malet(이)가 1424년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 브리지왓어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh Malet(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Roynon(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1459년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트에서 Sir William Hody(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1510년 영국 잉글랜드에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Malet родилась в 1424 г. в местности бриджвэитир, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Hugh Malet было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Roynon, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Hody около 1459 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1510 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 86 лет.
